sections.heading: Introduction
sections.content: This Cookie Policy explains how TripFi, Inc. ("TripFi", "we", "our", or "us") uses cookies and similar tracking technologies when you visit our website or use our services. By using our platform, you consent to the use of cookies as described in this policy.

sections.heading: What Are Cookies
sections.content: Cookies are small text files that are placed on your device by websites you visit. They are widely used to make websites work efficiently and to provide information to the website owner. Cookies can be "persistent" (remaining on your device until deleted) or "session" (deleted when you close your browser).

subsections.heading: Strictly Necessary Cookies
subsections.content: These cookies are essential for the operation of our platform. They enable core functionality such as security, session management, and account authentication. Without these cookies, parts of the site cannot function.
list: Authentication tokens to keep you signed in
Session identifiers for security purposes
CSRF protection tokens

subsections.heading: Functional Cookies
subsections.content: These cookies allow us to remember choices you make and provide enhanced, personalised features.
list: Your preferred language and currency
Your travel preferences and saved searches
Theme preferences (light/dark mode)

subsections.heading: Analytics Cookies
subsections.content: These cookies help us understand how visitors use our platform, allowing us to improve our services.
list: Pages visited and time spent on each page
How users navigate through the platform
Error reporting to identify and fix issues

subsections.heading: Marketing Cookies
subsections.content: These cookies track your browsing habits to deliver targeted advertisements and measure the effectiveness of our marketing campaigns.
list: Personalised travel deal recommendations
Retargeting advertisements on third-party sites
Conversion tracking for our marketing campaigns

sections.heading: Third-Party Cookies
sections.content: Some cookies on our platform are placed by third-party services, including:
list: Analytics providers (e.g., Google Analytics) to measure site performance
Payment processors to handle secure transactions
Social media platforms if you choose to share content
Customer support tools for live chat functionality

sections.heading: Managing Your Cookie Preferences
sections.content: You have several options for managing cookies:
list: Browser settings: Most browsers allow you to control cookies through their settings
Opt-out tools: Use industry opt-out tools such as the Digital Advertising Alliance's opt-out page
Platform settings: Manage your preferences within your TripFi account settings
Deleting cookies: You can delete existing cookies through your browser settings
sections.footer: Please note that disabling certain cookies may affect the functionality of our platform.

sections.heading: Changes to This Policy
sections.content: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any significant changes by posting the new Cookie Policy on this page. We encourage you to review this policy periodically.
